subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy fragrant letter was perused and divine breaths were inhaled therefrom. Thanks be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مشکبو ملاحظه گردید نفحات رحمانی از آن استشمام میشد شکر
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
